comment.body:
so in example, that is as 6360/6400 area, okay? be ready for a fakeout, don't go all-in, but scale some OTM spreads to make it cheap.
and you can cover the losses via intraday calls if market squeezes up.
but if market leaves the area and builds a structure, you better leave, if you use options (due to theta)

comment.body:
trading is not about catching tops and bottoms.
many traders chase tops and bottoms, and i know that it looks virtuoso when somebody catches it, but thats mostly a fortune...
I catched a lot... on twitter and even on intraday trades when i did live trading signals...
but if you remember, i always market a zone for myself, instead of playing some sort of "guess where the top is" game
